title: Tool Body Sections
description: Markdown body sections expected in every tool file. Not frontmatter — extracted by ingest, never validated by JSON Schema.

## Description.description: One-to-two sentence description of what the tool does.

## Pros.description: Bullet list of advantages noted by the user. Only populated from explicit user opinion, never inferred. Append new bullets; never duplicate.

## Cons.description: Bullet list of drawbacks noted by the user. Only populated from explicit user opinion, never inferred. Append new bullets; never duplicate.

## Notes.description: Free-form opinion or observations recorded verbatim from the user. Append paragraphs; preserve existing text.
